docket_entries.description: COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF LIM, KENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY LIM, KENT AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-21-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO AMENDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-15-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-30-2016 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO ADD ANOTHER DEFENDANT, "CHING." PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
